analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with incomplete black hole-themed UI. The current state shows CSS files with partial cosmic/dark themes but missing key animated elements for black holes, swirling effects, and glowing visuals. The HTML files lack complete content structure for black hole-related sections. The theme needs enhancement with animated black hole visuals, cosmic patterns, and smooth transitions.

improvements.description: Add CSS animations for black hole visuals including swirling effects, gravitational lensing, and glowing accretion disks using @keyframes and transforms.
Implement cosmic background patterns with radial gradients and SVG patterns for space textures and black hole event horizons.
Add animated black hole section with interactive elements showing event horizon, singularity, and accretion disk animations.
Create JavaScript functions to control black hole animations, including zoom effects, particle systems, and interactive gravitational pull simulations.
Add smooth transitions and hover effects for cosmic elements with CSS transforms and opacity changes for interactive black hole exploration.
